features: Celebrate the arrival of a beautiful baby girl with this heartfelt Welcome to the World card. Featuring delicate hand-drawn illustrations and a timeless wooden keepsake, this card is designed to be cherished forever.
Crafted with care using FSC certified materials. This eco-friendly card comes in 100 percent plastic-free packaging, making it the perfect choice for environmentally conscious gifting.
The included laser engraved wooden keepsake doubles as a charming nursery decoration or a sentimental keepsake. A beautiful way to commemorate a new baby's arrival, baby showers, or christenings.
Each card comes with a premium 120gsm envelope and a fun sticker sheet. This gift-ready package ensures a memorable and thoughtful presentation for new parents.
Support a small family business with this elegant and meaningful card. Designed to create lasting memories, this is a heartfelt way to welcome a new baby girl into the world.
description: Welcome the arrival of a precious baby girl with our beautifully designed Welcome to the World card. Combining sentimental charm, eco-friendly values, and thoughtful craftsmanship, this card is more than just a message. It is a lasting keepsake that parents will treasure forever. Featuring hand-drawn illustrations and a laser engraved wooden keepsake, this card is made with FSC certified materials and packed in 100 percent plastic-free packaging. The wooden keepsake is perfect for decorating a nursery or keeping as a meaningful reminder of this special moment. A fun sticker sheet is also included, adding a playful and personal touch to every package. With a premium quality envelope included, this card is the perfect choice for baby showers, christenings, or simply celebrating the joy of a newborn baby girl. By choosing this card, you are supporting a small family business that values quality, sustainability, and heartfelt connections.
